specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running, Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services, and we've built a reputation for doing the work right — the kind of reputation that comes from actually showing up and getting the job done, not just talking about it.

Our team handles everything from thorough boat surveying and inspection to diving and underwater services, marine AC and climate control systems, and marine plumbing and sanitation. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey before you commit to buying a vessel, underwater hull work that keeps you out of the boatyard, a malfunctioning marine air conditioning system sorted out in the middle of summer, or a sanitation system that's giving you trouble, we've got the experience and equipment to handle it.

We serve boat owners across South Florida and the surrounding waters — a region that demands reliable, year-round marine service. Our clients range from weekend boaters to serious cruisers, and we treat every vessel with the same level of care we'd want for our own. When your boat represents a significant investment, you want a marine services partner you can actually count on. That's what Ben's Boatworks is here to be.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A professional boat survey gives you a clear, detailed picture of a vessel's condition — structural integrity, mechanical systems, safety equipment, and more. Whether you're buying a boat, renewing insurance, or just want to know where things stand, a thorough inspection can save you from costly surprises down the road.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our diving and underwater services cover hull inspections, propeller and shaft work, zinc replacement, line and debris removal, and bottom cleaning — all without hauling the vessel out of the water. Keeping the underwater portion of your boat in good shape directly affects performance, fuel efficiency, and long-term hull health.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: We install, service, and repair marine air conditioning and climate control systems to keep your boat comfortable in warm-weather conditions. From diagnosing refrigerant issues and checking seawater cooling circuits to full system replacements, we work on a wide range of marine HVAC equipment to get your system running reliably.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Marine plumbing and sanitation systems require specialized knowledge — from through-hulls and seacocks to holding tanks, macerators, and Y-valves. We troubleshoot and repair sanitation system failures, upgrade aging plumbing components, and make sure everything meets current marine standards so you're not dealing with leaks, odors, or compliance issues on the water.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection for buyers
Underwater hull cleaning and zinc anode replacement without haulout
Marine air conditioning system diagnosis, repair, and seasonal service
Holding tank and marine sanitation system repair or upgrade
Propeller, shaft, and running gear inspection via commercial diving
Through-hull and seacock inspection, resealing, or replacement
Insurance or damage survey following an incident or grounding
